Proposal A risks alienating Player RED and potentially leading to a rejection, especially given the relatively small difference in price. It also uses up a proposal, limiting my flexibility later. Proposal B is safer and more efficient. The team split is 1-1, and I believe Proposal B is the better strategy given the limited proposals.
